2026-06-01-fix-marketing-reporting-db-ga.title: Marketing Report
2026-06-01-fix-marketing-reporting-db-ga.summary: Unified admin reporting: GSC, Google/Meta/Bing ads, CallRail & CTM calls/forms, GMB, and PageSpeed. Sync metrics, pick 7/28/90-day windows, and create shareable client report links.
tips: Open Reporting in the sidebar — run Sync metrics after connecting channels.
Share links live at /report/{token}; disable or delete from the admin page anytime.
Requires the marketing reporting migration on each Supabase project.
Connect GSC once on any brand — other sites pick up the shared agency token after deploy.
Use Forgot password? on the login screen; reset links land on /admin/reset-password.
